description: Recto: deed of release (שובר) in Hebrew from Yosef b. Bahlūl to an unnamed person. Date, location and witnesses are not preserved. Verso: collection of poetry in Hebrew in a different hand from that on recto, celebrating individuals such as Shelomo b. ʿEli, Manṣur b. Yisraʾel, and Yefet b. [...]. (Information from CUDL.)
description_he: מסמך משפטי בAramaic, Hebrew. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
